content.json: # Photo Album Telemetry\nUse this workbook to monitor sessions, uploads, and deletes from Application Insights telemetry emitted by the app.

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name in ('photo.session.activity', 'photo.session.ended')
| extend p = todynamic(Properties)
| summarize AvgSessionMs = avg(todouble(p.sessionDurationMs)), MaxSessionMs = max(todouble(p.sessionDurationMs)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Session Duration Trend

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name in ('photo.upload.file', 'photo.upload.batch')
| extend p = todynamic(Properties)
| summarize Uploads = count(), Success = countif(tostring(p.result) == 'success'), Failed = countif(tostring(p.result) == 'failure') by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Upload Success vs Failure

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name == 'photo.delete'
| extend p = todynamic(Properties)
| summarize Deletes = count(), Success = countif(tostring(p.result) == 'success'), Failed = countif(tostring(p.result) == 'failure') by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Delete Success vs Failure

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name in ('photo.upload.file', 'photo.delete')
| summarize P50DurationMs = percentile(DurationMs, 50), P95DurationMs = percentile(DurationMs, 95) by Name, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Operation Latency (P50/P95)

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name == 'photo.upload.file'
| extend p = todynamic(Properties)
| summarize Count = count() by FileType = tostring(p.mimeType)
| order by Count desc
content.title: Top Uploaded File Types
